text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And now... for the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I have arrived at the steep peak that is 3,600
meters!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If I win today's race... I might as well be a stayer,
right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This will mean I've completely dominated the
Bakushin Road, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
3,600 meters is no obstacle for me anymore, I'll
run it clean!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Is that a quirk of yours, Trainer? Thank you for
the reassuring nod!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day a stayer with immense speed
shall be born!
